ddls:
CREATE TABLE "security_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the tenant or organization */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system where the event was generated */,
  "time_generated_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was generated (UTC) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the event (e.g., Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the event was logged */,
  "computer" TEXT /* Name of the computer or device where the event occurred */,
  "task" INTEGER /* Task associated with the event */,
  "event_level" INTEGER /* Event level (numeric code) */,
  "event_level_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name of the event level (e.g., Information) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Additional data associated with the event */,
  "event_id_detail" INTEGER /* Detailed event ID */,
  "management_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the management group */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Structured event data in JSON format */,
  "raw_event_data" TEXT /* Raw event data */,
  "event_origin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event origin */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., WindowsEvent) */,
  "_resource_id" TEXT /* Resource identifier for the event (e.g., Azure resource path) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the security event (e.g., New, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the event */,
  "event_source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event source within the source system */,
  "event_context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the event */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the event (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES event_channels ("channel_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_computer FOREIGN KEY ("computer") REFERENCES computers ("computer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_provider FOREIGN KEY ("provider") REFERENCES event_providers ("provider_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_event_level FOREIGN KEY ("event_level") REFERENCES event_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_management_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("management_group_name") REFERENCES management_groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant or organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the tenant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tenant was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the tenant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the tenant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tenant's account (e.g., Active, Suspended, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computers" (
  "computer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the computer */,
  "computer_name" TEXT /* Name of the computer or device */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Operating system type (e.g., Windows, Linux) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the computer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the computer (e.g., data center, office) */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the computer was last seen */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the tenant or organization */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the computer */,
  "hardware_info" TEXT /* Hardware information (e.g., CPU, RAM) */,
  "last_reboot" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last reboot */,
  "security_status" TEXT /* Security status of the computer (e.g., Patched, Vulnerable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("computer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_providers" (
  "provider_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the event provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event provider */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the event provider */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event provider */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event provider (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_channels" (
  "channel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the event channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event channel */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the event channel */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity in the channel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event channel (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the event level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold level for alerts */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event level (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the management group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the management group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management group */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the tenant or organization */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of management group (e.g., IT, Security) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the management group */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the management group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., security analyst, IT administrator) */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the tenant or organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_data_fields" (
  "field_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event data field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the event data field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event data field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the event data field */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security event */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the event data field */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field contains sensitive data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_fields_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES security_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES security_events ("event_id")
)
